title: USSC Group - Exton, PA - PH&C
excerpt: Key Features: Tenant Representative for 183,952 SF new warehouse. Underground stormwater management retention facilities. Provided a cross connection to the existing building, allowing two way fork lift traffic. Pre-engineered building, mid-level FF/FL floor. EFSR sprinkler system with fire pump.   https://unitedsafetycorporation.com/
contentHtml:
Key Features:

  • Tenant Representative for 183,952 SF new warehouse.
  • Underground stormwater management retention facilities.
  • Provided a cross connection to the existing building, allowing two way fork lift traffic.
  • Pre-engineered building, mid-level FF/FL floor.
  • EFSR sprinkler system with fire pump.  
  • https://unitedsafetycorporation.com/
